task_completion.description: Open Firefox and navigate to the QuarterlyPlanning meeting
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser is open, showing the Jitsi Meet pre-join screen or meeting interface for 'QuarterlyPlanning' (URL: http://localhost:8080/QuarterlyPlanning).
The agent has bypassed the pre-join screen and is inside the active Jitsi Meet meeting interface.
The 'Breakout rooms' sidebar or panel is visible within the Jitsi Meet interface.
The text 'Revenue Strategy' is clearly visible as a created breakout room in the Jitsi Meet breakout rooms panel.
The text 'Operations Review' is clearly visible as a created breakout room in the Jitsi Meet breakout rooms panel.
The text 'Product Roadmap' is clearly visible as a created breakout room in the Jitsi Meet breakout rooms panel.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the breakout rooms panel to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, import, or gnome-screenshot), a save file dialog, or an image viewer confirming a screenshot was saved to the exact path '/home/ga/breakout_rooms_evidence.png'.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual Firefox browser to access Jitsi Meet
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine Firefox browser UI elements and the Jitsi Meet web interface, not a text editor or mocked environment.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jitsi Meet GUI to create the rooms
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking the 'Add breakout room' buttons and typing the names into the UI, rather than using browser developer tools to inject HTML.

integrity.description: Agent took a genuine screenshot of the screen
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a screenshot utility or browser feature to capture the screen, rather than just creating an empty file named .png using 'touch' or similar commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting URL is 'http://localhost:8080/QuarterlyPlanning'. The expected breakout room names are 'Revenue Strategy', 'Operations Review', and 'Product Roadmap'. The final screenshot must be saved to exactly '/home/ga/breakout_rooms_evidence.png'.
